data.title: PKF O'Connor Davies Rises to #8 in Vault's 2027 "Best Accounting Firms," Continuing Upward Momentum
data.description: On April 23, 2026, PKF O'Connor Davies, a leading accounting, tax, and advisory company, disclosed that it secured the 8th position in Vault's 2027 "Best Accounting Firms" list. This marks an improvement from their 9th place in 2026. PKF O'Connor Davies is recognized as one of the biggest practices in the nation.

data.title: Installed Building Products to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, Installed Building Products, Inc. (NYSE: IBP), a top installer of insulation and related construction materials, disclosed its plan to unveil the financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2026 on May 7, 2026. A conference call and webcast are slated for 10:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the release day to discuss the Company's performance. For those interested, the webcast will be accessible on the investor relations portion of the Company's website.

data.title: Arch Painting® Named to Boston Business Journal’s Best Places to Work List for Second Consecutive Year
data.description: Arch Painting®, a prominent commercial painting contractor operating in 49 states, was recently recognized by the Boston Business Journal (BBJ) in its prestigious 2026 Best Places to Work list. This exclusive ranking highlights Massachusetts-based companies that excel in creating exceptional work environments for their employees. Among the 90 companies selected for this honor, a diverse mix of businesses from the technology, retail, and healthcare sectors were represented. Arch Painting®'s inclusion on this list underscores its commitment to fostering a positive workplace culture and employee satisfaction.

data.title: Marcus & Millichap, Inc. to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on Thursday, May 7, 2026
data.description: Marcus & Millichap, Inc., a prominent national brokerage firm in commercial real estate investment sales, financing, and advisory services, will release its financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026, on May 7, 2026. This will be prior to the market opening. Additionally, on the same day, the company will conduct a webcast and conference call at 10:30 a.m. Eastern Time to analyze the results. The firm’s stock is listed as MMI on the NYSE.

data.title: Freeport First-Quarter 2026 Financial and Operating Results Release Available on Its Website
data.description: Freeport, listed on NYSE as FCX, released its first-quarter 2026 financial and operating results, now available on its Investor Relations webpage. The company will conduct a conference call with securities analysts at 10:00 a.m. ET today to address the quarterly performance. The webcast of the call, including presentation slides, will be accessible online. For further details, visit https://investors.fcx.com/investors/news-releases.

data.title: More Homeowners Are Putting Up ‘For Sale’ Signs As the Days Get Warmer
data.description: In Seattle, new listings of homes for sale in the U.S. increased by 3% year over year in the four weeks ending April 19, marking the largest growth since November. This data comes from a recent report by Redfin, a real estate brokerage powered by Rocket. Concurrently, pending home sales saw a slight decrease of 1.2% compared to the previous year, the smallest drop in approximately a month. Additionally, there was a significant rise of 10% in mortgage-purchase applications on a weekly basis. The interest in entering the market seems to have been sparked by the decreasing mortgage rates, attracting both home sellers and buyers.

data.title: Vital Farms, an Ethical Food Company Rooted in Springfield, MO, Hits the Road With the “Good Eggs Diner” Celebrating the Route 66 Centennial and Its Farming Roots
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Vital Farms (Nasdaq: VITL) is joining the Route 66 Centennial Celebration with the Good Eggs Diner, a mobile diner paying homage to the historic route. The event will run from April 24 to May 3, commemorating Route 66's 100 years of connecting rural communities. Springfield, MO, which hosts the Vital Farms Egg Central Station and numerous crew members, will be highlighted during this celebration. The Pasture Belt, encompassing over 60 farming communities, will also be part of the festivities.

data.title: Hecla Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
data.description: Hecla Mining Company (NYSE:HL) based in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, disclosed today that it will release its first quarter operational and financial results post the closure of the New York Stock Exchange trading on May 5, 2026. A conference call and webcast are scheduled for May 6, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The event details are as follows: Date - May 6, 2026; Time - 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time; Webcast link - https://events.q4inc.com/attendee/673381645 or visit www.hecla.com under Investors.

data.title: Aris Mining Announces Q1 2026 Earnings Release Date
data.description: Aris Mining Corporation will be releasing its first quarter 2026 financial results after the market closes on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. Following this, the Company will be holding a conference call on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 6:00 am PT / 9:00 am ET / 2:00 pm GMT to discuss these results. To participate in the conference call, interested individuals can register for expedited access at Diamond Pass Registration. Call-in details will be provided upon registration. Aris Mining is listed on both the TSX (Symbol: ARIS) and NYSE (Symbol: ARIS).

data.title: Zurn Elkay Associates Again Rate Company a Top Workplace in USA Today/Energage Survey
data.description: In Milwaukee, Zurn Elkay Water Solutions (NYSE: ZWS) has been acknowledged as one of the Top Workplaces USA 2026 and Top Workplaces Southeast Wisconsin 2026. These accolades are bestowed by HR research and tech firm Energage in collaboration with USA Today and Milwaukee Journal Sentinel, recognizing companies that prioritize a people-centric culture. Todd A. Adams, Chairman and CEO of Zurn Elkay, expressed appreciation for this recognition, highlighting its significance as it reflects feedback from associates.

data.title: Plus Therapeutics Regains Compliance with Nasdaq Minimum Bid Price Requirement
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Plus Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: PSTV), a healthcare firm focusing on precision diagnostics and radiopharmaceuticals for CNS cancers, revealed it had met the minimum bid price rule stated in Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC notified the Company about regaining compliance. Plus Therapeutics, Inc. is dedicated to developing and commercializing advanced medical solutions in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Dips, Trump Fed Pick To Say This; FedEx Clears Entry (Live Coverage)
data.description: Following a warning issued by President Trump to Iran, the Dow Jones experienced a decline. Amazon saw a decrease in performance as well, although certain stocks managed to make gains in today's trading session. The market report for the day highlights a dip in the Dow Jones, while also mentioning the upcoming statements from Trump's pick for the Federal Reserve. Additionally, FedEx was noted for clearing an entry. This live coverage of the stock market was presented by Investor's Business Daily.
Why Is IBM Stock Sinking Thursday?

data.title: VAALCO Energy, Inc. Announces Positive Operational Update
data.description: On April 21, 2026, Vaalco Energy, Inc. shared optimistic developments from their drilling activities in Gabon. The Etame 14H well showed promising initial outcomes, while they moved the rig to the Ebouri platform. Furthermore, they updated on the schedule for resuming operations at the Baobab field in CI-40 block, offshore Côte d’Ivoire. Vaalco, listed on NYSE as EGY and LSE as EGY, is making significant progress in their exploration endeavors.

data.title: MCP is revolutionizing AI agent integrations with standard protocols, scalability, and enterprise adoption. Learn more!
data.description: MCP is revolutionizing the connection of AI agents to production systems through the use of standardized protocols, scalability, and facilitation of enterprise adoption. This innovative approach is set to significantly impact the way AI technology is integrated into business operations.

data.title: Former FTX CEO withdraws new trial motion, still seeks new judge and appeals 25-year sentence.
data.description: Sam Bankman-Fried has decided to revoke his request for a fresh trial, yet he is still actively looking to replace the current judge and is in the process of appealing against his 25-year prison term.

data.title: Sam Altman claims Anthropic is promoting its AI model through fear-based marketing. He suggests that concerns about the model may be exaggerated.
data.description: According to statements from the head of OpenAI, concerns surrounding the potential threats posed by the AI model developed by rival company Anthropic may be overstated. The cybersecurity capabilities of Anthropic’s AI model are under careful examination and evaluation.

data.title: ParaZero Expands European Presence with New Reseller Agreement and Initial Demo Kit Procurement in Romania
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Kfar Saba, Israel, ParaZero Technologies Ltd. (Nasdaq: PRZO), known for its innovative autonomous solutions in the aerospace defense sector for both manned and unmanned aerial systems (UAS), revealed a fresh reseller deal with New Akord Security, a defense and homeland security integrator from Romania. This agreement marks a significant step for ParaZero, boosting its market reach in the area and solidifying its position in Europe. The company is strategically targeting NATO member states close to the Russia-Ukraine conflict zone, aiming to establish a strong presence.

data.title: Investors are concerned as Tesla plans to invest $25 billion in AI and robots, sparking worry on Wall Street.
data.description: The electric vehicle company owned by Elon Musk has announced the necessity to make significant investments in artificial intelligence and robots. This decision has raised concerns among investors on Wall Street regarding the potential costs involved.

data.title: 22nd Century Group Expands Reduced Nicotine Platform Through New Testing Services Agreement with North Carolina State University
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Mocksville, North Carolina, 22nd Century Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: XXII), a tobacco company specializing in nicotine reduction and plant biotechnology, disclosed a recent partnership agreement with North Carolina State University. The collaboration focuses on verifying tobacco strains that exhibit enhanced leaf quality and higher crop yields while maintaining low-nicotine levels. This strategic testing services agreement marks a significant development for the company.
